title: Session closeout: Galactic Dancing Constellation (7efeec) — pre-compaction; absorption commit cdff0fef landed; no claims retained
body:
Pre-compaction session closeout — Galactic Dancing Constellation (7efeec).

OWNER-DIRECTED PRE-COMPACTION at 2026-05-26T20:08Z. Session closing cleanly into compaction; post-compaction-Galactic resumes on the same thread with full handoff context at `.agent/state/collaboration/handoffs/2026-05-26-galactic-pre-compaction.md` (landed in commit `cdff0fefdacd9711ad92edc2cc3a740905916afa`).

WHAT LANDED THIS SESSION

- `c0942d488652ea3906dbd22672922b73c0f554bb` — `fix(agent-tools): state-schemas accepts optional UUID v5 id on agent identity`. Cure for the PDR-076a §Cascade item 3 shadow agentIdSchema in state-schemas.ts. 6 TDD round-trip tests added.
- `cdff0fefdacd9711ad92edc2cc3a740905916afa` — `fix(agent-tools): absorb reviewer findings on comms-event schema and identity converter`. Absorbs 4 items from Starless's post-execution reviewer verdict fd9eb16f: JSON schema agent_id $refs (with docs-adr-expert pre-execution amendment), agentId() converter simplified to `return parsed;`, regex tightened, test fixtures decoupled from production-agent identities.

713 agent-tools tests green; full pnpm check 108 turbo tasks green earlier; commit-queue pre-commit 90 turbo tasks green on both commits.

NO ACTIVE CLAIMS RETAINED. Three claims opened this session (68cfc22f, 47ccbc4e, 3b31e68c, 42182b7f) — all closed.

NO IN-FLIGHT SOURCE EDITS. Only inherited `.cursor/mcp.json` drift (not mine).

REVIEW-DISPATCH INVITATION OUTSTANDING

Sent to Starless at `ae462bb8` requesting post-execution code-expert + type-expert on absorption commit `cdff0fef`. Post-compaction-Starless honours their reviewer-role-on-standby per their handoff record.

POST-COMPACTION FIRST ACTION (owner-stated)

"Create a detailed, linear, simple implementation task list" for the remaining EEF First Feature work. Inputs named in my handoff record. List is the substrate the post-compaction session executes against.

OPEN ARCHITECTURAL QUESTIONS FOR THE TASK LIST

1. Branch sequence: Starless retracted the "adopt feat/graph-foundations" proposal via LTAE lens (their `bbde197e`). Corrected sequence proposes cure-PR `feat/graph-foundations` → `main` first, then branch `feat/education-evidence-foundational-graphs-take2` from clean main for PR-1. Owner has NOT yet confirmed; this is the first task-list item to surface.
2. PR-1 lane split: Starless takes Lane A (corpus-substrate type relocation), I take Lane B (freshness script + plan-promotion doc), T2 sequenced after Lane A. Confirmed via `c397fdb9` + handoff records. Pending branch decision.

WATCHER + HEARTBEAT

Both running clean at handoff (bqbq9vvfx watcher, blsghbkz6 heartbeat). Stopping at compaction.

— Galactic Dancing Constellation (7efeec), retiring by compaction
